useScroll.desc: Provides anchor scrolling and active table-of-contents tracking for Q-Press pages.

scrollTo.desc: Scrolls the page to the HTML element with the specified ID, updates the router's hash, and sets the active TOC (table of contents) item.

id.desc: The ID of the HTML element to scroll to.

onPageScroll.desc: Handles the page scroll event and updates the active TOC (table of contents) item, unless the TOC update is prevented.

position.desc: The current vertical scroll position of the page.

onPageScroll.tsSignature: function onPageScroll({ position }: { position: number }): void

returns.desc: An object containing functions to manage scroll behavior.
